title: TheGlow
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24e4c96cc0a7807f5a1a80c92d3a91d4aa82e2a4.png)

TheGlow is a versatile plugin designed for Minecraft servers running versions 1.20 to 1.21 .
Key commands include opening the glows menu (/glow). and the ability to create custom glows.
In general, TheGlow manages player glows.​



![F](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88198a2c6a8444c125b08979040aea83be3b3a24.png)



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Rg8f8VKntYQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



- Create custom shines
- Ability to edit base commands
- Use of MySQL or SQLite storage
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Hexadecimal color support
- Support for custom model data.
- Editable menu without limitations
- Permissions to use glows
- Support for LibsDisguises
- TAB support


![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b64624149c5efa589c860b127629cef50478a2d.png)


# PLAYER​
/glow - Open the glows menu


# ADMIN​
/theglow help - View help message
/theglow reload - With this command you can reload the configuration files.
/thegradient set [player] {ID} - Set a glow to an online player



![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3576708d9c9c088db8c19d449cdad435acea1aa.png)




Support through Discord
Welcome to the support center of our Discord community! Here you can get quick help and connect with other users. Follow the steps below to join our server and get assistance:


Join Our Discord Server: Click on the following link to join our Discord server,
Select Support Channel: Once on the server, go to the designated text channel for support, e.g. "support" or "FAQ".
Create a TIcket: Write your question or describe the problem you are experiencing with the ticket. Our community moderators will be happy to help you.
Expect an Answer: Normally, you will receive an answer in a short time. If you don't get an immediate response, don't worry, someone will help you soon!
Note: Our support and community team is available at different times, so please note that responses may vary depending on availability.
